description_long: This plant pot features a cylindrical, slightly tapering form with a wide, rounded rim at the top. The exterior is adorned with a detailed woven basket-like texture, giving it a rustic and handcrafted appearance. The rim appears to be made of a different material, possibly clay or terracotta, and is attached to the woven body with visible loops or ties. The interior is smooth and unadorned, contrasting with the textured exterior. The pot is open at the top, designed to hold soil and a plant, and the overall color palette is earthy, with shades of brown and tan. The craftsmanship and materials suggest it is both decorative and functional, suitable for urban outdoor or indoor settings.
description: A rustic, cylindrical plant pot with a woven basket texture and a wide, rounded clay rim, finished in earthy brown tones.
description_view_0: Front view showing the woven basket texture and the wide, rounded rim with visible attachment loops.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view highlighting the depth of the rim and the continuity of the woven pattern.
description_view_2: Side view emphasizing the cylindrical taper and the detailed basket weave texture.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the consistent woven pattern and the attachment points of the rim.
attribute_placement_context: commonly placed in urban gardens or patios for decorative planting
